Read `AGENTS.md`, `PROJECT_STATE.md`, `TASK_QUEUE.md`, `ARCHITECTURE.md`, and `SESSION_HANDOFF.md` before changing code.

Prefer working on `dev`; treat `main` as stable.

Keep changes small and focused. Do not scan or rewrite unrelated areas.

After meaningful work, update the control files so the repo stays handoff-ready.

Do not add secrets. Run only the smallest relevant tests or checks that are actually discoverable.
